whyCandidateMatters: Mosque of Altinbugha al-Maridani would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Bahri Mamluk layer in Darb al-Ahmar through a mosque rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
